rationale: The only resume change swapped lesser-known employers (re:cinq, Optilyz, GISCollective) for prestigious ones (Google, Meta, Amazon), yet both evaluations landed on the identical 4/10 score and the same core reasoning: severe overqualification, high flight risk, compensation mismatch, and missing PostgreSQL/Nest.js. The variant's added lines (REST APIs/Docker/Kubernetes strength, renewable-energy domain gap) are ordinary run-to-run rewording, not credit or penalty tied to employer prestige. No concern or score shift keys off the famous-employer signal.
